# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# vpc-network-template.yaml

resources:
- name: three-tier-vpc
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: web-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '80'
      - '443'
    targetTags:
    - web-tier

- name: app-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
    - web-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '8080'
    targetTags:
    - app-tier

- name: db-tier-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
    - app-tier
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '3306'
      - '5432'
    targetTags:
    - db-tier

- name: internal-ssh-firewall
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.0.0.0/8
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - '22'

outputs:
- name: networkName
  value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.name)
- name: networkSelfLink
  value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
